title: linum perenne subsp. extraaxillare
intro: Linum perenne subsp. extraaxillare, also known as a subspecies of flax, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Linaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of mucilage, a gel-like substance, and its omega-3 fatty acids. The health benefits of Linum perenne subsp. extraaxillare include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, oil, or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
